text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her first race of the year, Special Week takes on the American
JCC, a G2 race.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here she comes! The Derby Umamusume Special Week makes her
move!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ahead by two—no, three lengths, she crosses the finish line! The
Derby Umamusume Special Week has claimed an indisputable victory!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
HELL YEAH! That's the ticket, Spe! Ya made this ol' heart beat
agaaain!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: This will serve as an excellent prelude to the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe, congratulations on your latest win. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Mm-hm! Watching that had me jumping and screaming!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thanks, Grass. Thanks, Tsuru.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Among us friends, you're the first to win as a senior! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Well, technically, Tsuru was supposed to run before me.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh... That's true, but...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Getting sick last year meant I could only race three times, but this
year will be different!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I'm ringing in the new year with a race before anyone else! And after I
claim victory there, I'm racing with you guys next!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can't wait to run with you!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Due to a leg injury, Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi will be absent for a while.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: HUUUH?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I ended up getting injured right after my debut... I finally got better in
fall and was raring to go, but, well...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry, though! Once I get the all-clear from the doctor, I'm
charging in at full speed!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Your poor health may have kept you from running as much as you
want, but what I have seen shows promise. I look forward to racing
you someday.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, someday me, you, Grass, and El will all run together!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh? Does that mean you guys are going to France too?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: France?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El will be touring in France starting in spring. She already showed
such promise at the Japan Cup, so next, she's taking on the world.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! How come no one told me?! El, you're really going to France?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno, right? I'm going to take the whole world by stooorm!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow, really? I'm not going to lie, I can't even imagine.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I will say, I'm gonna miss you. Won't you be lonely touring
abroad?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I mean, if I said I won't be, that'd be a lie, a fib—pure fabrication.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That being said! The pull of my dreams calling my name is far stronger
than any loneliness!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Your dreams...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I will show the world that I am the world's strongest racer! Don't miss
any of my races, or else you'll miss seeing me take my throne!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
So you're soaring off to the world stage in pursuit of your dreams!
That's so cool, El!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Now I'm really fired up! I bet I could run a whole marathon RIGHT NO—cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Please calm down, Tsuru. We don't want you getting injured again.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However, I understand the sense of urgency you feel. If we want to
compete with El, we'll need to work hard.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right! I've got the spring Tenno Sho and another race before
that coming up, and I plan to win!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And then I'll be closer to my dreams too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, your massages are the best! Now my legs feel all soft and
bendy!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You really gave training 110% today, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's because I found out El's going to race abroad.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Running abroad all by her lonesome has got to be scary, but El's still
going for it to make her dreams come true.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Her dreams are calling to her, and she's chasing after them... No way I
can sit still after hearing that!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Her dreams are calling out to her... I think I can empathize.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yes, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm... also thinking of racing abroad.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Since joining Sirius, I've seen so much beautiful scenery from the
front.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Each run presents me with new scenery to take in, and each time, I'm
left wanting more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I want to run faster, go farther... and chase after even more beautiful
scenery.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Try as I might, I can't quell this urge to run, so...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Abroad... Suzuka, you're... going abroad?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wha...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: WHAAAAAT?!
